analyticsCatalog.labels.more.crowdinContext: Count of additional labels beyond the primary one, shown as an underlined link after the primary label title in the catalog detail header (e.g. '+8 more'). Placeholder is the number of remaining labels.

analyticsCatalog.labels.trigger.ariaLabe.crowdinContext: Accessible name for the labels link in the catalog detail header that opens a popup listing all of the attribute's labels.

analyticsCatalog.labels.popup.title.crowdinContext: Title of the popup in the catalog detail header that lists all of an attribute's labels. Plain noun.

analyticsCatalog.labels.popup.close.crowdinContext: Accessible name for the close (X) button of the labels popup in the catalog detail header.
